diagrams.name: agent_runner_loop
diagrams.title: Agent Runner Loop (Core Turn Cycle)
diagrams.description: Main LLM turn loop: build messages → call LLM → parse tool calls → dispatch → collect outcomes → decide continue/exit

diagrams.name: task_processing_pipeline
diagrams.title: Task Processing Pipeline (GeneraticAgent.run)
diagrams.description: Task queue consumer: dequeue task → slash-command handling → build system prompt → invoke agent loop → stream output chunks → final display

diagrams.name: tool_dispatch_execution
diagrams.title: Tool Dispatch & Execution Flow
diagrams.description: Handler routing: resolve do_* method → before-callback → execute tool → after-callback → yield output → return StepOutcome

diagrams.name: code_execution_flow
diagrams.title: Code Execution Activity (code_run)
diagrams.description: Execute Python/bash/powershell: write temp file → Popen subprocess → stream stdout via thread → timeout/stop-signal kill → collect exit code → cleanup

diagrams.name: web_browser_automation
diagrams.title: Web Browser Automation Flow (TMWebDriver)
diagrams.description: Browser control: init driver → get/switch sessions → execute JS via WebSocket/HTTP bridge → monitor DOM changes → return result

diagrams.name: llm_session_initialization
diagrams.title: LLM Session Initialization & Switching
diagrams.description: Startup: load API keys → detect session types (Claude/OAI/Native/Mixin) → build ToolClient list → next_llm switch → reload tool schema

diagrams.name: telegram_frontend_flow
diagrams.title: Telegram Frontend Message Handling
diagrams.description: Receive Telegram message → auth check → put_task → async stream polling loop → edit message with live output → deliver file attachments on done

diagrams.name: memory_management_flow
diagrams.title: Long-Term Memory Update Flow
diagrams.description: Agent triggers memory update → read global memory → classify info (L2 env facts / L3 SOP) → file_patch minimal update → skip if no new value

diagrams.name: reflect_mode_loop
diagrams.title: Reflect / Autonomous Mode Loop
diagrams.description: Load reflect script → poll INTERVAL → call check() → if task returned: put_task → drain result → call on_done → log → repeat or exit if ONCE

diagrams.name: scheduled_task_execution
diagrams.title: Scheduled Task Execution (scheduler.check)
diagrams.description: Scan sche_tasks JSON files → check enabled/repeat/schedule/cooldown/max_delay → trigger matching task → write done report → L4 session archive cron
